zh.lifeSummary: 當John Warren於1525年8月1日出生在英國素福爾可納易藍德時，他的父親Robert Warren of Wissington40歲，母親Margaret Cornwallis18歲。他於1563年9月5日與Agnes Anne Howlett在英國素福爾可納易藍德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1576年4月23日在英國素福爾可納易藍德享年50歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可納易藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Warren于1525年8月1日出生在英国素福爾可納易藍德时，他的父亲Robert Warren of Wissington40岁，母亲Margaret Cornwallis18岁。他于1563年9月5日与Agnes Anne Howlett在英国素福爾可納易藍德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1576年4月23日在英国素福爾可納易藍德享年50岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可納易藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Warren
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Warin, Werin, a borrowing of ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. Compare Waring .

English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from La Varrenne in Seine-Maritime, France, named with a Gaulish element probably descriptive of alluvial land or sandy soil. This was the name of a major Norman family after the Conquest. In Ireland, this name has been Gaelicized as Bharain.
Irish: adopted as an English form of Gaelic Ó Murnáin (see Murnane , Warner ).

variants.name: Warrens
meanings: English: variant of Warren with genitival or excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Warrener
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French warrennier ‘warrener’, an officer employed to watch over game in a park or game preserve. Compare Warren .

variants.name: Murnane
meanings: Irish (Munster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Murnáin, a shortened and dissimilated form of Ó Manannáin ‘descendant of Manannán’, name borne in Celtic mythology by a sea god associated with the Isle of Man. All three syllables appear in the variant Marrinan. This name has also been Anglicized as Warren and Warner .

variants.name: Warne
meanings: occasionally a habitational name from Wearne in Somerset. The place takes its name from a lost stream-name based on British verno- ‘alder, swamp’.

variants.name: Waring
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Warren , from the Norman personal name Warin, derived from ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France and among the Normans (see Guerin ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When John Warren was born on 1 August 1525, in Nayland, Suffolk, England, his father, Robert Warren of Wissington, was 40 and his mother, Margaret Cornwallis, was 18. He married Agnes Anne Howlett on 5 September 1563, in Nayland, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 23 April 1576, in Nayland, Suffolk, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Nayland, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Warren est né le 1 août 1525, à Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert Warren of Wissington, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Margaret Cornwallis, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Anne Howlett le 5 septembre 1563, à Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 23 avril 1576, à Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Warren am 1. August 1525 in Nayland, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Warren of Wissington 40 und seine Mutter Margaret Cornwallis 18. Er hat am 5. September 1563 in Nayland, Suffolk, England Agnes Anne Howlett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 23. April 1576 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Nayland, Suffolk, England und wurde in Nayland, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Warren è nato il il 1 agosto 1525 nel Nayland, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Robert Warren of Wissington, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Cornwallis, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Anne Howlett il 5 settembre 1563, nel Nayland, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 23 aprile 1576, nel Nayland, Suffolk, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Nayland, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Warrenが1525年8月1日にイギリススフォルクナイランドで生まれた時，父Robert Warren of Wissingtonは40歳，母Margaret Cornwallisは18歳であった。1563年9月5日にイギリススフォルクナイランドでAgnes Anne Howlettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1576年4月23日にイギリススフォルクナイランドで50歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクナイランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Warren(이)가 1525년 8월 1일 영국 수폴크 나이랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Warren of Wissington(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Cornwallis(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1563년 9월 5일 영국 수폴크 나이랜드에서 Agnes Anne Howlett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1576년 4월 23일 영국 수폴크 나이랜드에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 나이랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.1 August 1525–23 April 1576: 1 de agosto de 1525–23 de abril de 1576
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Warren nasceu em 1 de agosto de 1525, em Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Warren of Wissington, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Cornwallis, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Anne Howlett em 5 de setembro de 1563, em Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de abril de 1576, em Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Warren родился 1 августа 1525 г. в местности неиланд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Warren of Wissington было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Cornwallis, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Anne Howlett 5 сентября 1563 г. в местности неиланд, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 23 апреля 1576 г. в местности неиланд, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности неиланд, суффолк, Англия.

es.1 August 1525–23 April 1576: 1 de agosto de 1525–23 de abril de 1576
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Warren nació el 1 de agosto de 1525, en Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Warren of Wissington, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Margaret Cornwallis, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Agnes Anne Howlett el 5 de septiembre de 1563, en Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 23 de abril de 1576, en Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
